TextENGNew: ``...Just leave him be.@k@vS02/00/132600008. ...His friends have gone missing.@k@vS02/00/132600009. ...Poor kid.``
My old man -- who normally never spares a thought for anyone else -- was showing concern for me.
"Shouldn't our Keiichi stay home from school for a while too?@k@vS02/00/132600011. I think it would be safer to avoid going out until the police sort this out."
``...You may be right.@k@vS02/00/132700032. ...Compared to the alternative, missing a few days of school is nothing...``
``More importantly, shouldn't the school be closed during such a dangerous situation?!@k@vS02/00/132600013. Honestly, what do those teachers think our children are?!``
My parents were working themselves up over it, but... I genuinely couldn't have cared less.
...That wasn't the only thing I felt nothing about, either.
...The breakfast table, the food laid out before me, the time, myself... I truly had no interest in any of it.
The feeling was like... a thick fog that wouldn't clear from my head... It reminded me of the dizziness you get from taking strong medication when you're sick.

``Keiichi.@k@vS02/00/132600015. How are you doing with your schoolwork?@k@vS02/00/132600016. You're ahead of the other kids, aren't you?@k@vS02/00/132600017. If that's the case... it'd be fine if you took a break for a while...?``
...I didn't even feel like answering.
...Today was Thursday.
...Only four days had passed... since the Watanagashi Festival.
Only that long, and yet... everything had changed.@k ...Everything.
The tranquil, idyllic scenery of the village, as warm and gentle as an Indian summer, had been utterly transformed...
People vanished in the night... and even walking outside in broad daylight felt dangerous... The village had become a place ruled by fear.
I had no right to curse this fate.@k ...Because the root cause of it all... was me.
That night.
...Defeated by a truly petty, foolish curiosity... I had broken the taboo.
``...We're not supposed to be in here, are we?!@k@vS02/01/130100945. Let's stop! Breaking into a locked building is a crime, even if you don't steal anything!!``

``Shion, now that you know it wasn't some secret meeting place, that's enough, right?!@k@vS02/01/130100947. I have absolutely zero interest in any of this!@k@vS02/01/130100948. What if Rika-chan's performance ends while we're wasting time in here?!``
...I rattled all that off, snatched the lock from Tomitake-san's hands... and fastened it back in place.
I'll forget everything I saw in here, so come on!@k Let's go, let's go!!
...I physically pushed the reluctant Takano-san along.@k Tomitake-san gave a strained smile.
Shion shrugged, as if to say I was being ridiculous.@k ...But that was fine by me.
I hurried everyone along, pushing them forward.
...Rika-chan's performance was still going.
...And before long, her dance concluded to thunderous applause.
...I, too... clapped until my hands turned red... I clapped... and clapped............
...Ding-dong.
``Isn't that Rena-chan?@k@vS02/00/132700034. It's around your usual time, so she must be here to walk with you, right?``
I glanced up at the clock.@k ...It was five minutes past the time I was supposed to meet Rena.
``Keiichi.@k@vS02/00/132600019. Don't you think you should stay home from school for a while?``
``...............You're right.@k@vS02/01/130100950. .........Thanks for worrying about me.``
I stood up from the table.
...I headed to the front door to meet Rena.
``Good morning.@k@vS02/02/130200390. ...Starting today, we're walking to school in a group.@k@vS02/02/130200391. ...So you can't be late.``
...Oh... right.
...If we, the ones who lived farthest away, were late, the younger kids waiting along the route would be left standing there.
``............Actually.@k@vS02/01/130100952. ...I've decided to stay home for a while.@k@vS02/01/130100953. ...From school.``
Rena answered briefly and nodded.
``...I think you should do whatever feels right for your own well-being, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS02/02/130200395. ...So you shouldn't feel guilty about it or anything.``

``Oh, and also... here.@k@vS02/02/130200397. ...The neighborhood circular.@k@vS02/02/130200398. ...Could you pass it along to your mother?@k@vS02/02/130200399. It seems like there are a lot of important notices in it.``
I accepted the circular.
...It was bound with far more pages than usual.
...The one on top... announcing the disappearances of the village chief, Rika-chan, and Satoko, and asking for any information... cut straight to my heart.

``............The police are searching with everything they have, too.@k@vS02/02/130200401. ...They'll find them. I'm sure of it.@k@vS02/02/130200402. Just hang in there.@k@vS02/02/130200403. ...Okay?``
...Rena said this with a smile, trying to encourage me.
...But rather than giving me courage... her smile looked more like she herself desperately wanted to believe they were safe...
``...........Rena, you're......not going to interrogate me about it?``
``...Rena... you know, don't you?@k@vS02/01/130100957. ...That night, I...``
``You mean... sneaking into the ritual storehouse?``
...For a moment the words caught in my throat... but I bit my lip, steeled myself, and gave a small nod.
``So everyone knows, huh...@k@vS02/01/130100959. ...Honestly... I never should have done something like that...``
``...Mii-chan was furious, you know.``
...Furious, huh.
......I suppose... that makes sense.
``But you know, I think what really made Mii-chan angry... wasn't so much the sneaking in itself.@k@vS02/02/130200408. ...It was that you tried to hide it from her.``
``Keiichi-kun... don't you think you should have come forward yourself and apologized?``
...I should have come forward myself... and apologized.@k ...Those words stuck in my heart.
...Just one week ago...@k I had done something else... that I should have apologized to Mion for myself...
I had hurt Mion terribly...
And yet I hadn't realized it at all.
...On top of that, with all the chaos from Shion's sudden appearance... I still hadn't been able to tell Mion about it...
``............Rena... you're right.@k@vS02/01/130100962. ...I never... realize anything...... until you point it out to me............``

``Keiichi-kun.@k@vS02/02/130200411. ...Just hypothetically.@k@vS02/02/130200412. ...If you had admitted right away that you'd done something wrong... and apologized to Mii-chan.@k@vS02/02/130200413. ......Do you think Rika-chan and Satoko-chan might not have had to disappear?``
I couldn't answer right away.
...To admit that was...
...But wasn't Rena telling me, right here and now?
...That I... should have owned up to my sins sooner.
...If I had confessed sooner and apologized... maybe things would never have spiraled into something so horrifying...?!
...Rena's eyes were filled with kindness, yet they held no leniency for my silence... She gazed straight into my eyes, unwavering.
...If I had admitted my sin sooner... then Rika-chan and Satoko...... wouldn't have had to die or disappear...
Rena's open palm... struck me across the cheek.
...I stood there frozen, my head still turned from the blow... unable to move a muscle.
There was no pain... not really.
``I don't think... anyone has properly scolded you for this, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS02/02/130200415. ...So I'll do it in their place.``
Pressing a hand to my stinging cheek... I stared silently down at Rena's feet...
changeReason: OLD misinterprets 熱を持つ頬 (cheek hot from the slap) as 'warm with embarrassment,' adding an emotional reading not in the JPN. The heat is physical, from being slapped.

TextENGNew: ``Going somewhere you're forbidden to go is very, very wrong!!@k@vS02/02/130200417. ...Do you understand that?!``
``The answer is 'yes'...@k@vS02/02/130200419. Keiichi-kun.``
``And what's even worse... is refusing to admit you did something wrong!!@k@vS02/02/130200421. Doing something bad is terrible enough... but not owning up to it and apologizing is far, far worse!!!``
For a while, Rena fixed me with a silent, piercing stare... as though confirming the sincerity of my remorse.
...Then, at last, the tension in her expression softened... and she smiled.
``............Well then... it's about time.@k@vS02/02/130200423. I need to get going.``
``Make sure you... give the circular to your mom, okay?@k@vS02/02/130200425. Also, there's a note saying not to take it around after dark.``
I picked up the circular I'd dropped when she slapped me.
...The pages had come loose from the clasp and scattered everywhere. I gathered them up one by one.
...My hands paused on a single, easygoing page filled with cheerful, everyday language.
......We still have plenty of authentic, handcrafted soy sauce available.@k Please feel free to stop by the Sonozaki residence.
I picked up the page and scanned the densely written text.
...Apparently, a distant relative in Akita brewed premium soy sauce.
They had recently sent over a large shipment.
...Since they couldn't possibly use it all, anyone who wanted some was welcome to come by... it said.
As a postscript, it noted that the soy sauce had arrived in barrels, so please bring a large bottle or other container.@k ...That was how it concluded.
``.........If you wanted soy sauce... you'd go to the Sonozaki house.@k@vS02/01/130100973. ...Rena.@k@vS02/01/130100974. ...You knew about this all along... didn't you...``
...Rena... had already suspected Mion... from the moment she noticed that the large soy sauce bottle was missing.
...Rika-chan had taken the big bottle... and gone to Mion's house.@k ...And there... she was made to disappear.
When Rika-chan didn't come back, Satoko -- who knew she had gone to the Sonozaki house -- called there.@k ...And then... Satoko was lured there too...
That meeting on the day the village chief disappeared... Didn't Ooishi-san say@k that the Three Families had attended it?
...The Three Families included Mion's family -- the Sonozakis.
...And didn't he also say that since the current head was elderly, her heir, Mion, frequently represented the family at official functions?
As the village chief was heading home from the shrine... Mion had called out to stop him.
...She'd invited him back to their house to talk.@k ...And then... made him disappear.
Making Shion disappear... would have been even simpler.
...Shion was... a member of the Sonozaki family.@k ...It's safe to say they knew her every move at all times.@k ...They would have even known her part-time work schedule.
Come to think of it... wasn't that restaurant, Angel Mort, run by the Sonozaki family?@k ...Setting up an ambush there... would have been child's play...
``I'm... going to Mion's.@k@vS02/01/130100976. ...To apologize.``
``I'm going to... make her put an end to all of this.@k@vS02/01/130100978. ...Mion probably won't forgive me easily... but I'll beg her... not to let anyone else become a victim.``
Once I'd made up my mind... there was no reason for me to sit around in a daze any longer.
I slipped on my shoes, brushed past Rena, and headed out the door...
...Rena stopped me.
``I'm coming too.``
``.........Rena... what about school...?``
``This is far more important than school.``
``............Rena, don't come.@k@vS02/01/130100981. ...If you get dragged into this on top of everything else... I think I might truly lose my mind.``
...Rena didn't lower the arm blocking my path.
``......If you disappeared too, Keiichi-kun...@k@vS02/02/130200432. ...I think I might truly lose my mind as well.@k@vS02/02/130200433. ...So I won't let you go alone.``
Despite the firmness in Rena's voice... tears were gathering at the corners of her eyes...@k Seeing them, I understood just how resolute she was...
Rena gave a small but resolute nod... and finally lowered the arm she'd been blocking me with.
......Let's go.@k ...To Mion's house.
I'll apologize.
...For the sins I've committed.
...And I'll put an end to this.
...To these days of madness.
And then... I'll pray...
...that someday... we can return to those lively, joyful days.
With Rena at my side... I stepped outside.
...A car was waiting out front.@k ...It was Ooishi-san.
``Well, good morning.@k@vS02/11/130700334. Maebara-san.@k@vS02/11/130700335. And Ryuugu-san, too.@k@vS02/11/130700336. Together so early in the morning? How enviable. Nfu-fu-fu-fu-fu...!``
If he'd been staking out the place this early just to pressure me, he was certainly a dedicated man.@k ...But this morning, that might actually work in our favor.
``You're with the police, aren't you...``

``Oh my, have I not introduced myself to you, Ryuugu-san?@k@vS02/11/130700338. How terribly rude of me.@k@vS02/11/130700339. I'm Ooishi, from the Okinomiya Police Department.@k@vS02/11/130700340. Pleased to make your acquaintance.``
``......Are we... going to tell Ooishi-san?``
``...Yes.@k@vS02/02/130200436. ...My slap was enough to atone for your sin, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS02/02/130200437. ...But for Mii-chan's sins... we need these people to handle it.``
............Pain and sorrow.@k I hung my head... as those tangled emotions welled up inside me.
``...Ooishi-san, we have something to tell you.``
``Well, well.@k@vS02/11/130700342. And what might that be?@k@vS02/11/130700343. ...Shall we talk standing here?@k@vS02/11/130700344. Or would you prefer to sit in the car?``
``In the car, please.``
...All I could do was hang my head weakly...@k ...I could only be grateful... for how strong and dependable Rena was...
......With Rena's encouragement, I told him everything.
Ooishi-san nodded along with exaggerated murmurs of interest while jotting down notes.@k ...We continued like that for some time...
``............So, how do you feel?@k@vS02/11/130700346. Don't you feel a weight lifted now that you've gotten it off your chest?``
Ooishi-san said this while scratching his head with his ballpoint pen.
...Of course I didn't feel better.
...The price that had been paid because I'd refused to confess until now... was immeasurable...
Until that price was repaid... the weight on my chest would never be lifted...
Static crackled from the radio.
``...This is Kumagai.@k@vS02/19/133100004. Ooishi-san, over!``
``Yes, hello.@k@vS02/11/130700348. This is Ooishi.``
``The school was notified earlier that she'll be absent today.@k@vS02/19/133100006. No movement at the Sonozaki residence.@k@vS02/19/133100007. The target is still inside the premises.``
``Very good. Continue surveillance.``

``Roger that.@k@vS02/19/133100009. Relief arrived for units three and seven; they've returned to base.@k@vS02/19/133100010. ...Also, it seems the division chief is looking for you, Ooishi-san.@k@vS02/19/133100011. He keeps calling me, saying to contact him the moment I reach you... What should I tell him?``
``Na-ha-ha-ha...@k@vS02/11/130700351. If he presses you for an answer, just tell him I'm napping and you've been ordered not to wake me.``
``Roger.``
``Sorry about that.@k@vS02/11/130700353. Work call.``
``...He just said there was no movement at the Sonozaki house, didn't he?``

``Oh dear... you caught that?@k@vS02/11/130700355. Well, that's unfortunate.@k@vS02/11/130700356. Please keep it to yourselves, all right?@k@vS02/11/130700357. The division chief hasn't authorized this surveillance.``
...Ooishi-san... had been suspicious of Mion for quite some time.

``...We can't get authorization for questioning, or house searches... We can't get permission for anything at all.@k@vS02/11/130700359. The Sonozaki family's defense apparatus -- designed to protect the main house -- is running at full capacity, it seems.``
``Without a warrant, we can't lay a finger on anything short of catching someone in the act. Nfu-fu-fu-fu!``
``.........Ooishi-san... could it be that you...``
Rena glared at Ooishi-san, her tone alone making her hostility unmistakable.
``You can't get into the Sonozaki house yourself.@k@vS02/02/130200442. ...So you've been trying to get Keiichi-kun to go in for you, haven't you?``
``...Rena, what do you... what do you mean...?``
``This man... is exactly as despicable as I suspected.``
``......That's quite hurtful to hear.@k@vS02/11/130700362. But by all means, I'm listening.``
Ooishi-san took a drag on his cigarette and responded to Rena with a relaxed expression, as though letting her accusation roll right off him.
``You've had Mii-chan in your sights all along because you thought she was suspicious, but you couldn't get a warrant.``

``...You schemed to provoke Keiichi-kun into going to the Sonozaki house.@k@vS02/02/130200446. ...And if something happened to him, you planned to use that as your pretext to raid the place.@k@vS02/02/130200447. ...Am I wrong?``
............I could only grasp about half of what Rena was saying...
...But I understood clearly that Ooishi-san had been trying to use me.
``...Even though Keiichi-kun could have been attacked as a result.@k@vS02/02/130200449. ...How shameless!!@k@vS02/02/130200450. Is this how the police operate?!``

``.........Well, well... it seems we have quite the detective on our hands.@k@vS02/11/130700365. ...My, my, my.@k@vS02/11/130700366. ...Would you be interested in taking our entrance exam?@k@vS02/11/130700367. I'd happily write you a recommendation for the detective division. Nfu-fu-fu-fu-fu...!!``
``Contemptible.``
Rena spoke the word quietly, laden with hostility.
``...I've been called all manner of things in my time, but a single word from a young lady cuts the deepest.``
``Still... I suppose I should thank you, at least, for not having arrested Mii-chan up to now.``
``Much obliged.``
Ooishi-san seemed to be enjoying his exchange with Rena.
...This man's thoughts were like a swamp... impossible to see to the bottom.
...Once again, I was reminded of how thoroughly I disliked him.

``......Now then.@k@vS02/11/130700371. As two esteemed friends of Sonozaki Mion-san, what do you intend to do from here?@k@vS02/11/130700372. Will you sit tight while I build my case and apply for a warrant?``
``No.@k@vS02/02/130200454. We won't wait for that.@k@vS02/02/130200455. ...We're going to go... and convince Mii-chan to turn herself in.``
...That's right.
...Turning herself in versus being arrested -- the consequences would be entirely different...
At this point, that was perhaps... the only mercy we could still offer her.
``I see, I see. I wonder if it will go that smoothly.@k@vS02/11/130700374. ...If things go wrong, you two might not come out of it unscathed, you know?``
...Ooishi-san was testing the depth of our resolve.@k ...So I spoke with all the conviction I could muster.
``We're... prepared for that!``
...Ooishi-san let out an unsettling, yet seemingly satisfied grin.
...It was then that I realized -- this man had been maneuvering to use us all along.
``If anything happens to us, use it as your justification to move in.@k@vS02/02/130200457. ...Ideally, I'd like you to have the place completely surrounded so the culprit can't escape.``
``...Na-ha-ha-ha-ha!@k@vS02/11/130700376. Ryuugu-san, you're quite the negotiator as well.@k@vS02/11/130700377. You've got me beat.@k@vS02/11/130700378. I surrender.``
``......Wh-What does that mean...?``
``If the police have Mii-chan's house surrounded...@k@vS02/02/130200459. ......that becomes our insurance for the worst-case scenario.@k@vS02/02/130200460. ...For the very worst case.``
And it would also serve as added pressure for Mion to turn herself in... or so it seemed...
``Ahh... Ooishi to Kuma-chan.@k@vS02/11/130700380. Ooishi to Kuma-chan.``
``...This is Kumagai.@k@vS02/19/133100014. Go ahead.``
``Two friends of ours are going to pay a visit to the Sonozaki house.@k@vS02/11/130700382. ...Have reinforcements on standby, just in case.``
``Roger!``
...The brevity of their exchange... suggested that our visit had already been factored into their plans.
``Well then... shall we be off?@k@vS02/11/130700384. Care to pick up some sweets on the way?``
Neither Rena nor I had any patience for Ooishi-san's weak attempt at humor.
